title: Child Care Expense Assistance * College/University Students - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Child Care & Parenting > Child Care Expense Assistance * College/University Students 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter College/University Students Native American Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HIGHER EDUCATION COORDINATING COMMISSION OREGON STUDENT CHILD CARE GRANT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps parents or guardians enrolled in post secondary education to obtain safe, dependable care that supports their children's development while allowing completion of the parent's academic programs. Grant amounts cannot exceed $10,000 per academic year. The Child Care Grant may be renewed if the student has not exhausted eligibility or completed a bachelors degree, whichever comes first. 3225 25th Street SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: -Be an Oregon resident with a child or legal dependent age 12 and under in need of child care, or, if over age 12, who satisfies the requirements of special needs -Use a child care provider listed with the Oregon Department of Human Services, or, registered or certified with the Oregon Child Care Division -Have not earned a bachelor's or higher degree -Enrolled or planning to enroll as an undergraduate student at an eligible Oregon post secondary institution Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 687-7400 2 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIGHER EDUCATION COORDINATING COMMISSION OREGON STUDENT CHILD CARE GRANT
